customAttributes.description:
Avatar: The Last Airbender: My Cabbages!

Exile target nonland permanent. You lose 3 life.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair x Avatar: The Last Airbender: My Cabbages! and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 11/25/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: “Why?! Why did it have to be my cabbages?!”
